mapper.sql: id, user_id, book_name, description, cover_image, word_count, is_public, source_type, source_store_book_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_vocabulary_book ( user_id, book_name, description, cover_image, word_count, is_public, source_type, source_store_book_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{bookName}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{wordCount}, #{isPublic}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceStoreBookId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_vocabulary_book WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_vocabulary_book SET word_count = #{wordCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
